case_title: MEGAN WHITE ET AL VS. ANDREW LAU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WHITE, MEGAN JOSEPH, TAHLIA MYERS, EMILY YAN, DONAVAN GUTMAN, LAURA AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, ANDREW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED SEP-28-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, ANDREW

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFS (5) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

ORDER OTHER : DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR THIS ORDER WILL VACATE DISMISSAL ENTERED ON NOVEMBER 03, 2014 AND ALLOW CASE TO BE PLACED BACK ON CALENDAR. FOR NOVEMBER 04, 2014 TO REFLECT DATES ON ORIGINAL SC-100 AND ENDORSED COPIES. PROOF OF SERVICE TO REMAIN IN EFFECT.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR HEARING HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES (2) BY PLAINTIFFS MEGAN WHITE AND TAHLIA JOSEPH, ONLY; EXCEPT PLAINTIFFS EMILY MYERS; DONAVAN YAN AND LAURA GUTMAN WERE NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, MEGAN JOSEPH, TAHLIA MYERS, EMILY YAN, DONAVAN GUTMAN, LAURA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, ANDREW $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, ANDREW HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTIONS L.R. 18.0 SENT TO PLAINTIFF UNABLE TO FORWARD
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, ANDREW

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-05-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED NOVEMBER 25, 2014. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
